name: Cryst
short_description: In this action-packed game, unknown creatures invade a factory and steal diamond pieces. Your mission is to play through exciting stages, recover the missing pieces of diamond scattered across various locations, and restore them to the factory.
detailed_description: A mysterious group of unknown creatures has attacked a factory, stealing its valuable diamond pieces. Without the diamonds, the factory's operations have come to a halt, threatening its future. As the hero, you embark on a thrilling journey across diverse and challenging stages to track down the stolen pieces of diamond. Each stage presents unique environments, obstacles, and enemies. Use your skills and strategy to overcome obstacles, defeat the creatures, and retrieve the diamond pieces. Your ultimate goal is to return all the pieces of diamond to the factory, saving it from ruin. And the style of play is reminiscent of the distant past.
